phase_name: Runtime Integration + Event Emission + CLI Inspection

completed_tasks.name: Extend TelemetryEvent schema with M2 events + create EventEmitter
Wire event emission into LeaseManager state transitions
completed_tasks.progress: LeaseManagerOptions interface added, emitter constructor param added, storeEmitter import added — emitTelemetry calls NOT yet inserted

remaining_tasks.name: Add CLI inspection commands (pd task list/show, pd run list/show)

decisions.decision: Added emitter?: StoreEventEmitter optional param to DefaultLeaseManager constructor, defaulting to storeEmitter singleton
decisions.rationale: Avoids breaking existing callers (m2-05 tests) while enabling event emission

decisions.decision: Extended TelemetryEventType union from 3 to 11 types
decisions.rationale: M2 tasks need their own event types separate from core evolution events

next_action: Add emitTelemetry calls in lease-manager.ts acquireLease/releaseLease/renewLease/forceExpire methods, then create RuntimeStateManager (Task 3), then CLI commands (Task 4), then RecoverySweep events (Task 5), then TS verification (Task 6)
context_notes: m2-07 plan has 6 tasks. Tasks 1 done (TelemetryEventType=11, StoreEventEmitter created). Task 2 partially done (emitter param added to LeaseManager but emit calls not yet inserted). Worktree: feat/pd-runtime-v2-m1-foundation-contracts. 185 tests currently passing.
